title: Smoky Kielbasa Skillet
description: A hearty, gluten-free skillet dish featuring smoky kielbasa and syrian ingredients. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the kielbasa sausage and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
Remove the kielbasa from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until softened.
Add the sliced pepper to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add the diced potato to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, or until slightly tender.
Return the kielbasa sausage to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
